The '''''Boolarg''''' was a [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210 light freighter]] owned by [[Gaber Rollobad]]. The [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] used it to run goods across the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] until it was shot down by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces over [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="CCW" />
